findings.detail: Only standard library imports (dataclasses, enum). Pure data module — no imports from pipeline/, shadows/, gateway/, or any other project module.

Exports data types (Source, SourceTier, SourceStatus) and a data constant (SOURCES list) plus two filter functions (get_working_sources, get_sources_by_tier). This is a data container module — the single-entry-point rule does not apply to data modules per CLAUDE.md §3.1 exception.

35 total sources across 4 tiers: PRIMARY (8): FRED, BLS, SEC EDGAR, Federal Reserve, CFTC COT, ECB Press Releases, EC Press Corner, Brazil BCB Copom. RELIABLE (7): NewsAPI, GNews, MarketWatch, China Daily Bizchina, CGTN Business, SCMP Business, Financial Times. FRAGILE (3): Nikkei Asia, Xinhua English, EUobserver. BEST_EFFORT (17): ECB(via GNews) + 16 Google News proxies covering China, EU, emerging markets, commodities, healthcare, crypto. Plus Bluesky (social).

Source dataclass fields (name, tier, url, feed_type, reliability, rate_limit_rps, requires_auth, status, last_checked, consecutive_failures) match what scout.py and social_sources.py expect. feed_type discriminates: rss → standard RSS fetch, api → dedicated handler (NewsAPI, GNews, BLS), bluesky → AT Protocol handler.

Comments document removed sources with rationale: Investing.com (RSS returns headlines only), xcancel (only 1 article, FT covers), CapitolTrades (BFF API returned 503, manual fallback documented), Turkey TCMB (RSS returns headlines only). No dead code — removed entries have clear justifications.
